name: odoo-assistant-manager
description: Odoo ERP: sales, web orders, stock, products via XML-RPC. Optional Discuss listener.

required.name: ODOO_URL
required.description: HTTPS base URL of the Odoo instance

required.name: ODOO_DB
required.description: PostgreSQL database name used by Odoo

required.name: ODOO_PASSWORD
required.description: Password or API key; ODOO_PASS is accepted as an alias

notes: Registry metadata on ClawHub must list the same required env vars as this file to avoid security scanner inconsistencies.
